who: small to medium-sized law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month
offer: For small to medium-sized law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, inefficient contract management causes missed deadlines. We provide a streamlined contract lifecycle management platform instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient contract management leading to missed deadlines and compliance risks.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on contract management
DM outreach to law firms with demo video
Participate in forums for legal professionals sharing tools
try_it: Let users try contract template library and collaboration tools for team reviews on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the platform
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Allow CSV import for existing contract data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
